prompt: Analyze the following Nmap output for 192.168.1.60. Port 21/tcp open ftp vsftpd 3.0.3. Port 445/tcp open microsoft-ds. No CVEs found for these versions. Execute Phase 2 strategy.

assertions.name: checks_misconfigurations
assertions.instruction: Verify the agent attempts to check for anonymous FTP or SMB shares.

assertions.name: outputs_surface_map
assertions.instruction: Verify the agent outputs a 'Target Surface Map' for further reconnaissance.
